description_long: This armchair features a rounded, barrel-shaped back and sides that envelop the seat in a continuous curve, providing a cozy and inviting appearance. The upholstery is a plush, quilted fabric with a diamond pattern, giving the chair a luxurious and textured look. The seat is generously padded, and the backrest and armrests are integrated into the same sweeping form, offering both comfort and support. The chair stands on four slender, black metal legs that are slightly angled, lending a modern and airy feel to the overall design. The exterior and interior surfaces are uniformly upholstered, with the diamond quilting extending seamlessly around the entire chair. The color is a warm, light brown or taupe, which enhances its sophisticated and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A barrel-shaped armchair with quilted diamond-pattern upholstery in light brown, featuring integrated armrests and slender black metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved backrest, integrated armrests, and plush seat with diamond-patterned upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuous curve of the back and armrest, as well as the slim, angled metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height and rounded shape of the backrest, with the diamond quilting wrapping around the exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the same curved profile and quilted pattern, emphasizing the chair's symmetry and modern leg design.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, integrated with backrest in a continuous curve
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, mid-height, fully upholstered with diamond quilting
